data.title: Community Cautiously Optimistic Amid Key Resistance Level
data.description: According to Odaily, Greeks.live macro researcher Adam has released a briefing in the English community, revealing that members remain cautiously optimistic while closely monitoring the critical resistance level of $99,000. Although some members anticipate a price increase in March, recent hacking incidents and a low volatility environment have prompted active discussions on how to protect against downside risks. Following recent events, options skew has normalized, and yesterday's put options trading volume decreased by 50%. Options with the same strike price have been significantly repriced, with prices rising by 40-80% compared to the previous day.

data.title:

Greeks.live: The community is closely watching the key resistance level of Bitcoin at $99,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released an English community briefing, which disclosed that community members remain cautiously bullish, but closely follow the key resistance level of $99,000. Although some members expect prices to rise in March, considering the recent hacking incidents and the low volatility environment, they are currently actively discussing how to protect downside risks. Option skew has normalized after recent events. Yesterday's put option trading volume fell by 50%, and options with the same strike price showed a significant repricing, with prices rising by 40-80% compared to the previous day.

data.title: 🇺🇸 Fed Chairman Powell says Bitcoin is just like gold, except it's digital.
Bybit attackers suspected of issuing Meme tokens on PumpFun to launder money
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News On-chain data shows that Bybit attackers are suspected of issuing Meme tokens on PumpFun for money laundering. It is reported that the attackers transferred SOL tokens to a certain address and launched Meme coins. The current market value of the relevant Meme coins has reached about 2.2 million US dollars, and the trading volume is about 26 million US dollars, but the liquidity is low, reminding community users to be vigilant in interaction.

data.title: Bybit restores nearly half of Ether reserves following $295M OTC purchase
data.description:
Cryptocurrency firm Bybit has restored nearly half of its Ether (ETH) reserves after a massive crypto hack that rattled the global Web3 industry.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bybit-restores-nearly-half-of-ether-reserves/

data.title: Bybit Warns Of Impersonation Scams On Social Media
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency exchange Bybit has issued a warning on the X platform about fraudsters impersonating Bybit employees. The company advises the community to remain vigilant, emphasizing that Bybit will never request personal information, deposits, or passwords. Users are urged to verify official sources carefully and report any suspicious activity. Bybit cautions that if something seems amiss, it likely is, and encourages users to prioritize their safety.

data.title: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee Says Positive Setup for Stock Market Forming, Sees Incoming Rebound for 2025
data.description:
Fundstrat’s head of research Tom Lee says that the US stock market is most likely about to benefit from a bullish setup despite its recent correction. In a new interview with CNBC, Lee says in the face of tariffs and political uncertainty, markets still appear to be climbing a wall of worry, or the tendency […]
